title: Cursor Pagination, Ordering, Filters, and Snapshot Behavior
description: Entry lists use offset only, equal timestamps reorder, inserts create duplicates between pages, cursor fields are trusted, filters bypass indexes, and end boundaries are ambiguous. Learners cumulatively produce stable bounded reader timeline query through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose a deterministic immutable-enough order with unique tie-breaker and document updates that can move entries.
Encode version, tenant, sort values, direction, filters, expiry, and integrity without exposing authority or accepting arbitrary SQL.
Build forward and backward keyset predicates that match sort direction, null policy, indexes, and limit-plus-one boundaries.
